creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

The current devel/gearmand port tracks the 0.xx upstream branch, and
version 0.39 was recently released.  I prefer to upgrade the existing
port to 0.39 to avoid incompatibility breakage with current consumers.

Would you generate a shar file with version 1.1.1 of the port and attach
it to this PR?  I will then create devel/gearmand-devel to track that
branch.

Thank you,
Greg

- -- 
Greg Larkin

http://www.FreeBSD.org/           - The Power To Serve
http://www.sourcehosting.net/     - Ready. Set. Code.
http://twitter.com/cpucycle/      - Follow you, follow me
